---
title: "Roundell Palmer, 1st Earl of Selborn"
---

## Roundell Palmer, 1st Earl of Selborn

**Dates:** (1812-4 May 1895)

### Description

lawyer and politician

### Biography

He was created (1872) 1st Lord Selborne and (1882) 1st Earl of Selborne.  He was briefly engaged to Mary Coleridge in the summer of 1845; he then married (2 February 1848) Lady Laura Waldegrave (d. 1885).  [PB: ODNB]

### Letters

- [To Anna Meredith Barrett Lennard, Decr 21st 1898](../letters/3389_To_Anna_Meredith_Barrett_Lennard.html)
- Letter from May 8th [1895]
- Letter from Decr 6th 1893
- Letter from Nov 30th [or 3rd?] 1880
- Letter from April 23, 1872.
- Letter from Jan 31st 1866
- Letter from Friday 30th Oct? [sic] [1846]
- Letter from July 22d [1845[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
